chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1186 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection No.1 to 4 a/w reply of counsel thereof as Flag A 2. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ashfaq, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Rahat Ehsan, DPG Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG DSP Raza Mina, DSP Ahsan (Inv.) West, PI Nadeem PS Surjani and Asif Akber I.O PS Surjani --------- The grievance in the instant petition relates to incident which was reported to police vide Crime No.1357/2025 registered at PS Surjani Town for offences under Section 452,354,383,342, 337(a)(i), 34 PPC. Pursuant to Court’s directives, DSP Ahsan, Investigation, Sub Division, Manghopir, West Zone, Karachi, has filed its report wherein it is stated that the main accused Ali @ Alo Jatoi has been arrested and on his pointation, the robbed articles have been recovered. It has further been stated that the best possible efforts have been made to arrest the remaining culprits. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner is feeling harassment as accused are wandering there but police was not taking serious efforts to which learned DPG has opposed and contended that the police have made serious efforts and one of the nominated accused has already been arrested and efforts are under way to detect the remaining accused. Since the police has already taken serious efforts and arrested one of the nominated accused so also recovery has been made and report under Section 173 Cr.PC is also submitted before the learned trial Court, therefore, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner and ensure that the remaining absconders/accused are arrested.

Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner is feeling harassment as accused are wandering there but police was not taking serious efforts to which learned DPG has opposed and contended that the police have made serious efforts and one of the nominated accused has already been arrested and efforts are under way to detect the remaining accused. Since the police has already taken serious efforts and arrested one of the nominated accused so also recovery has been made and report under Section 173 Cr.PC is also submitted before the learned trial Court, therefore, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner and ensure that the remaining absconders/accused are arrested. For the purpose of arrest of the said remaining accused, the petitioner has also remedy available to him to file appropriate proceedings before the learned trial Court. However, official respondents are directed to ensure that no harassment is caused and protection is provided to the petitioner in accordance with the law. JUDGE Nadir*
